job-titles: Full Stack Web Developer | Game Developer
about-box-text: Hey There! I'm Michael, thanks for stopping by.
I am a software engineer who loves to wear many different hats.
I specialize primarily in web development.
Initially I was self taught, but then I went on to study full stack web development at Le Wagon, Tokyo.
In my free time I also like to make video games in Unity as a hobby.
In addition, I'm making my own board games, as well as creating my own digital art for my projects.
Feel free to check out some of my work!
I love learning and meeting new people, so feel free to reach out!
